thankYou.headline: Thank You
thankYou.message: From the bottom of our hearts, thank you to everyone who celebrated our special day with us. Your love, laughter, and presence made it truly unforgettable.

photos.title: Photos Are Coming!
photos.message: A link to the photos from our photographer and the photo booth will be sent to the email address you used when you RSVPed. Keep an eye on your inbox!

footer.title: Madeline & Alexander
footer.message: Thank you for being part of our story.
